race_asian: FLOAT | The percentage of Googlers in the U.S. who identify as Asian and zero or more other races | eg=[0.273, 0.323]

gender_us_women: FLOAT | The percentage of Googlers in the U.S. who are women | eg=[0.253, 0.322]

gender_global_women: FLOAT | The percentage of global Googlers who are women | eg=[0.255, 0.322]

## GOOGLE_DEI.DAR_REGION_NON_INTERSECTIONAL_HIRING
gender_men: FLOAT | The percentage of Googlers hired in the region who are men | eg=[0.75, NaN]
workforce: TEXT | Overall and sub-categories | eg=["leadership", "non_tech"]
region: TEXT | Region | eg=["AMERICAS (non-US)"]
gender_women: FLOAT | The percentage of Googlers hired in the region who are women | eg=[NaN, 0.518]
report_year: NUMBER | The year the report was published | eg=[2023, 2024]
